hero.title: Red Teaming
hero.subtitle: Realistic Testing of Security, Processes and Crisis Preparedness
hero.description: We test organizations the way a real event would – physically, digitally and organizationally. Not theoretically, but for real.

whatIsRedTeaming.title: What is Red Teaming?
whatIsRedTeaming.description1: Red Teaming tests an organization's resilience based on realistic event scenarios. No theory and no audit, but the direct path to a comprehensive security strategy that corresponds to individual risks, processes, dependencies and decision-making paths in everyday life.
whatIsRedTeaming.description2: Red Teaming combines physical, digital and organizational security into an understandable overall picture.
whatIsRedTeaming.question: We ask: What really happens when something happens?

whyRedTeaming.title: Why Red Teaming?
whyRedTeaming.description: Red Teaming makes these gaps visible before they cause damage. It shows where theory and practice diverge, which dependencies are critical and when decisions fail under pressure.
whyRedTeaming.physicalDesc: Access control, perimeter protection, evacuation routes
whyRedTeaming.digitalDesc: IT systems, network security, data integrity
whyRedTeaming.organizationalDesc: Emergency and crisis management, communication, decision-making paths, processes

cta.title: If you have to make decisions in an emergency, the basis for decision-making should exist beforehand.
cta.description: A 30-minute conversation is enough to create clarity.

hero.title: Approach
hero.subtitle: Red Teaming tests organizations the way a real event would
hero.description: Not along checklists, but along risk and dependencies.

quote.text: Decision-making foundations must be developed before a security event – not during a crisis.

whatIsRedTeaming.title: What is Red Teaming?
whatIsRedTeaming.description: Red Teaming tests an organization's resilience based on realistic event scenarios. No theory and no audit, but the direct path to a comprehensive security strategy that corresponds to individual risks, processes, dependencies and decision-making paths in everyday life.

redTeam.title: What is a Red Team?
redTeam.description: The term Red Team comes from the security sector. A Red Team is a group that, on behalf of an organization, conducts an artificially induced security event to uncover vulnerabilities, process gaps and decision-making deficits. The Red Team works closely with management to develop and conduct realistic scenarios.

threeDimensions.title: Red Teaming along three dimensions
threeDimensions.intro: Red Teaming combines physical, digital and organizational security into an understandable overall picture. The three dimensions are not considered in isolation, but along three dimensions:

physical.title: Physical Security
physical.description: Testing of access control, perimeter protection, evacuation routes and physical measures under realistic conditions.

digital.title: Digital Security
digital.description: Testing of IT systems, network security, data integrity and digital dependencies under realistic conditions.

organizational.title: Organizational Security
organizational.description: Testing of emergency and crisis management, communication, decision-making paths and processes under realistic conditions.

process.title: Process of a Red Teaming Assessment

step1.title: Conversation
step1.description: Initial conversation at management level to clarify goals, scope and framework conditions.

step2.title: Preparation
step2.description: Development of realistic scenarios based on individual risks and dependencies.

step3.title: Test
step3.description: Discreet test phase under real conditions – physically, digitally and organizationally.

step4.title: Reporting
step4.description: Management summary with clear priorities and action recommendations.

vsOthers.title: Red Teaming vs. Audits & Penetration Tests
vsOthers.intro: How does Red Teaming differ from traditional audits and penetration tests?

audit.title: Audits
audit.description: Focus on compliance and checklists. Review of documentation and processes against standards.

pentest.title: Penetration Tests
pentest.description: Focus on individual areas. Testing of IT systems and network security.

redteaming.title: Red Teaming
redteaming.description: Focus on resilience and reality. Testing of physical, digital and organizational dependencies under realistic conditions.

whatIsNot.title: What Red Teaming is not
whatIsNot.item1: Not an audit: Red Teaming does not test against checklists, but against reality.
whatIsNot.item2: Not a penetration test: Red Teaming does not only test IT systems, but physical, digital and organizational dependencies.
whatIsNot.item3: Not consulting: Red Teaming does not deliver measures, but decision-making foundations.

hero.title: Red Teaming for Hotels
hero.subtitle: Preparation determines the extent of damage.
hero.description: Red Teaming for hotels tests emergency and crisis preparedness under realistic conditions – physically, digitally and organizationally. Not theoretically, but for real. Preparation instead of improvisation.

truth.title: The uncomfortable truth
truth.description: Security rarely fails due to technology – but due to leadership, preparation and reality. Red Teaming tests the resilience of hotels under realistic conditions – not along checklists, but along risk and dependencies.
truth.item1: Plans exist, but are never really tested

nightmare.title: The nightmare scenario
nightmare.description: What happens when two things occur simultaneously?

basic.title: Red Teaming Basic
basic.subtitle: Establish decision-making capability
basic.idealDesc: Hotels that want to know where they stand – before they deepen.

advanced.title: Red Teaming Advanced
advanced.subtitle: Actively reduce liability & crisis risks
advanced.item3: In-depth analysis of crisis management & governance
advanced.idealDesc: Recommended for increased visibility, events, complex IT or regulatory pressure.

process.title: Collaboration process
process.step2Desc: Discreet test phase under real conditions

cta.title: If you have to make decisions in an emergency, the basis for decision-making should exist beforehand.
cta.description: A 30-minute conversation is enough to create clarity.

footer.tagline: Responsibility for hotel security is now at management level.

hero.title: Other Fields
hero.subtitle: Red Teaming beyond hotels
hero.description: Red Teaming is not limited to hotels. The methodology can be applied to all organizations that want to test their resilience under realistic conditions.

crisis.title: Crisis Management
crisis.description: Red Teaming tests crisis management structures under realistic conditions. Not along checklists, but along risk and dependencies.
crisis.item1: Crisis management structures and decision-making paths
crisis.item4: Cooperation between departments and external partners

evacuation.title: Evacuations
evacuation.description: Red Teaming tests evacuation capability under realistic conditions. Not along checklists, but along risk and dependencies.
evacuation.item3: Availability of evacuation lists and information
evacuation.item4: Cooperation between departments and external partners

fire.title: Fire Protection
fire.description: Red Teaming tests fire protection measures from a fundamental perspective. Not as a replacement for official inspections, but as a supplement to preparation.
fire.note: Important: A Red Teaming assessment does not replace an official inspection, but contributes to increased preparation.
fire.item3: Alarm systems and escalation processes in case of fire
fire.item4: Review and assessment of fire protection plans

authority.title: Official Inspections
authority.description: Red Teaming prepares organizations for official inspections. Not as a replacement, but as preparation.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: This privacy policy informs you about the type, scope and purpose of the processing of personal data within our online offering and the associated websites, functions and content.
privacy.dataCollectionText: When you visit our website, information of a general nature is automatically collected. This information (server log files) includes the type of web browser, the operating system used, the domain name of your Internet service provider and similar.
privacy.contactFormText: If you send us inquiries via the contact form, your details from the inquiry form including the contact data you provided there will be stored with us for the purpose of processing the inquiry and in case of follow-up questions.
privacy.rightsText: You have the right at any time to information about the data stored about you, their origin and recipients as well as the purpose of data processing. You also have a right to correction, blocking or deletion of this data.
